حبّ حياتي
Hey Houb Hayati,
Happy 1st Anniversary
One year ago you said
YEEES
to my heart. Officially.
A little something

I don't know how to express it the best way, but I just know that no word, in any language, could ever show you how much love I have for you in my heart.

Like I've always told you — you mean the world to me, and my whole life is built around you. This is the road I walked to become the man I am now.

Where it started

Two kids in the same class, no idea what was coming.

The quiet years

Then life pulled us apart, and there was only silence. I didn't know if I'd ever see you again.

You walked back in

Out of nowhere, you were there again. That was the moment everything changed.

Us, again

We started talking and never stopped. Best friends. All day, all night.

I fell for you

"Best friend" stopped being enough. I loved you — and you loved me back.

You became mine

You finally let me call you mine. Best decision either of us ever made.

Through everything

We fought, we broke, we walked away — and every time, we found our way back. Love always wins.

Us, in one strip 📸

Every moment that led me to you.

These are the moments that shaped my life — the best things that ever happened to me. Sitting close, holding eye contact with the love of my life: the most beautiful eyes I've ever seen, the most beautiful smile, the most beautiful lips, the most beautiful — and the sexiest — girl I've ever laid eyes on. You really are the girl of my dreams. You are the one. The one and only. You areTFARAH ♥

Our soundtrack 🎧

Press play on any of them — every single one is you.

I wrote you something 💌

Tap the seal to open it.

tap the ♥
Houb Hayati,

I've started this letter a hundred times and deleted it a hundred times, because every word I know — in Arabic, in French, in English — feels too small for what you are to me.

We were just two kids in the same class once. Then life took you away for years, and I had almost made peace with never seeing you again. But you came back. You walked right back into my life like you'd never left, and nothing has been the same since.

You were my best friend before you were my love. We talked for hours, for nights that were never long enough. I got to know every part of you, and somewhere in all of it, "best friend" stopped being enough. I fell for you completely.

You didn't rush into loving me out loud. You had your standards, and you were right to. You made me want to be better — so I became better, for you, for us.

This year wasn't perfect. We argued, we went quiet, we walked away more times than I can count. But every single time, we found our way back. That's how I know this is real — distance couldn't break it, silence couldn't break it, nothing can.

You are my whole world, Houb Hayati. My days begin and end with you on my mind, even with all these kilometers between us. I don't want a single life that doesn't have you in it.

One year down. And if it were up to me, I'd sign up for every year after this one without thinking twice.

— all my love, forever

So… will you let these lips stay mine — forever?

Because I've thought about it, and I can't picture kissing anyone else.
That smile is the reason I never stood a chance.
One year wasn't nearly enough of them.

I already knew 😌 ♥

Happy anniversary, Houb Hayati. Here's to forever.
